$comment: Team members cache for @mention suggestions. Edit with your team's real data. GUIDs must be resolved via API.

important.notice: GUIDs are NOT stored here  -  always resolve via core_get_identity_ids API
important.reason: GUIDs may change; API ensures accuracy
important.usage: Replace example entries below with your team's real information. Use searchTerms for @mention aliases.

exactMatch.description: Exact match on email or displayName

noMatch.description: No match found  -  ask user for clarification

errorMessages.notFound: I couldn't find a user matching '@{SEARCH}' in Azure DevOps.
errorMessages.multipleMatches: Found multiple users matching '@{SEARCH}'. Which one did you mean?
errorMessages.apiError: I couldn't verify the user mention due to a connection issue.
